name: todo-app-automation
description: Playwright BDD automation tests for the Todo App

scripts.allure:open: allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && allure open allure-report
scripts.allure:open:history: cp -r allure-report/history allure-results/history 2>/dev/null || true && allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && allure open allure-report
